seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Antill Ponds and Apslawn. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Antill Ponds vs Apslawn: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Antill Ponds and Apslawn.
heading: Antill Ponds vs Apslawn — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Antill Ponds, Tasmania and Apslawn, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Apslawn has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Antill Ponds (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Antill Ponds or Apslawn safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Antill Ponds has a flood risk score of 24/100, while Apslawn scores 43/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Antill Ponds scores 63/100 for bushfire risk. Apslawn scores 17/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Antill Ponds or Apslawn?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Apslawn has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.9% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
